allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\(''sharp''\); sharp\(''public/images/supet-logo.png''\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\(m.width, m.height\)\).catch\(\(\) => { const {execSync} = require\(''child_process''\); console.log\(execSync\(''npx image-size public/images/supet-logo.png''\).toString\(\)\); }\)")
